heading: Limitation on authority
label: 3710 Limitation on authority
text: Nothing in this chapter authorizes the Foundation to perform any function the exclusive authority for which is provided to the National Park Foundation by subchapter II of chapter 1011 of title 54.
notes: Amendments2020— inserted “exclusive” before “authority”.Pub. L. 116–1882014— substituted “subchapter II of chapter 1011 of title 54” for “ ( et seq.)”.Pub. L. 113–287Public Law 90–20916 U.S.C. 19e
